data.title: Desane Group Holdings Enhances Corporate Governance Framework
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Desane Group Holdings Ltd ( (AU:DGH) ) has provided an announcement.

Desane Group Holdings Ltd has released its updated Corporate Governance Statement, which outlines the company’s adherence to the ASX Corporate Governance Council Principles and Recommendations. The statement, approved by the board, highlights Desane’s commitment to transparency and accountability by detailing the roles and responsibilities of its board and management, and ensuring proper checks and agreements with directors and senior executives. This move is expected to reinforce stakeholder confidence and enhance the company’s governance framework.

More about Desane Group Holdings Ltd

Desane Group Holdings Ltd operates in the real estate industry, focusing on property investment, development, and management. The company is known for its strategic investments in commercial and residential properties, aiming to maximize returns for its stakeholders.

data.title: Nekkar ASA Renews Share Buy-Back Program to Strengthen Market Position
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Nekkar ASA ( (DE:0TT) ) just unveiled an update.

Nekkar ASA has renewed its share buy-back program, authorized by its Board of Directors, allowing the purchase of up to 10,742,711 shares with a maximum budget of NOK 100 million. The program, managed by an independent third party, aims to enhance corporate purposes and was initiated on June 2, 2025, with completion expected by May 30, 2026. As of week 34, 2025, Nekkar acquired 77,800 shares, bringing its total holdings to 6.323% of the company, reflecting a strategic move to strengthen its market position and shareholder value.

More about Nekkar ASA

Nekkar ASA is an industrial long-term owner of ocean-based technology companies, focusing on sustainable oceans, robotics, intelligent logistics, and digital solutions. With a 50-year heritage from Syncrolift, Nekkar employs a buy-to-own strategy to build long-term value, supporting operating companies with a strong balance sheet and reinvesting strategically for profitability and growth.

YTD Price Performance: 5.97%

Average Trading Volume: 95,660

Current Market Cap: NOK1.14B

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources Announces Estimated NTA Backing Per Share
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ).

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. has announced its estimated net tangible assets (NTA) backing per share as of August 22, 2025, with pre-tax and post-tax values of $2.14 and $2.18, respectively. These figures are indicative and based on previous monthly NTA reports and estimated equity performance, with private credit and unlisted assets not being valued weekly. This announcement provides stakeholders with a snapshot of the company’s financial standing, although it does not offer a complete picture of the portfolio’s performance, which will be detailed in the monthly NTA statement.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. operates in the natural resources sector, focusing on investment management. The company primarily deals with equities and private credit, offering financial products and services that cater to investors interested in natural resource markets.

data.title: Singtel Reports Strong Q1 2025 Earnings Growth
data.description:
Singapore Telecommunications ( (SNGNF) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Singapore Telecommunications presented to its investors.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Singapore Telecommunications, commonly known as Singtel, is a major player in the telecommunications industry, providing a wide range of services including mobile, broadband, and digital solutions across Asia and Australia. The company is noted for its significant presence in regional markets through strategic investments in various telecom operators.

In its latest earnings report for the first quarter ending June 30, 2025, Singtel announced a robust financial performance despite currency fluctuations and macroeconomic challenges. The company reported a 14% increase in underlying net profit, driven by strong contributions from its subsidiaries Optus and NCS, as well as regional associates Airtel and AIS.

Key financial metrics highlighted in the report include a stable operating revenue despite a 7% depreciation in the Australian Dollar, with EBITDA and OpCo EBIT increasing by 1.3% and 9.6% respectively. In constant currency terms, these figures would have shown even stronger growth. Exceptional gains of S$2.20 billion were recorded, primarily from the sale of a partial stake in Airtel and the Intouch-Gulf Energy merger, leading to a net profit of S$2.88 billion.

The report also detailed the performance of Singtel’s business segments, with Optus showing significant growth in mobile service revenue and NCS benefiting from increased demand in its Gov+ business. Meanwhile, Singtel Singapore faced challenges in its mobile segment, although it managed to maintain stable overall revenue. The company’s share of regional associates’ post-tax profits rose by 15%, reflecting strong performances from Airtel and AIS.

Looking ahead, Singtel’s management remains optimistic about future growth prospects, particularly in its data center business with upcoming projects in Thailand and Singapore. The company is committed to maintaining operational discipline and capitalizing on its strategic initiatives to drive sustainable growth.

  • ‘Nvidia Is Best Positioned to Clear a High Bar,’ Says TD Cowen as it Raises PT Ahead of Q2 Print
